recommendations.title: Platoon
recommendations.overview: As a young and naive recruit in Vietnam, Chris Taylor faces a moral crisis when confronted with the horrors of war and the duality of man.

recommendations.title: The Untold History Of The United States
recommendations.overview: Oliver Stone charts the history of the United States from the Second World War to the present.

recommendations.title: JFK
recommendations.overview: Follows the investigation into the assassination of President John F. Kennedy led by New Orleans district attorney Jim Garrison.

recommendations.title: Natural Born Killers
recommendations.overview: Two victims of traumatized childhoods become lovers and serial murderers irresponsibly glorified by the mass media.

recommendations.title: Snowden
recommendations.overview: CIA employee Edward Snowden leaks thousands of classified documents to the press.

recommendations.title: The Doors
recommendations.overview: The story of the famous and influential 1960s rock band and its lead singer and composer, Jim Morrison.

recommendations.title: World Trade Center
recommendations.overview: Two police officers struggle to survive when they become trapped beneath the rubble of the World Trade Center on September 11, 2001.

recommendations.title: Born on the Fourth of July
recommendations.overview: Paralyzed in the Vietnam war, Ron Kovic becomes an anti-war and pro-human rights political activist after feeling betrayed by the country he fought for.

recommendations.title: Nixon
recommendations.overview: A look at President Richard M. Nixon—a man carrying the fate of the world on his shoulders while battling the self-destructive demands from within—spanning his troubled boyhood in California to the shocking Watergate scandal that would end his Presid

recommendations.title: Salvador
recommendations.overview: In 1980, an American journalist covering the Salvadoran Civil War becomes entangled with both the leftist guerrilla groups and the right-wing military dictatorship while trying to rescue his girlfriend and her children.
